## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed
- any operational or data impact

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:unit`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` or explain why not

## Ops Notes

- App Hosting branches affected:
- New or rotated secrets:
- Backup / restore impact:
- Firestore index or rule changes:
